issue.message: Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Missing permissions required by WallpaperManager.getWallpaperFile: android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE or android.permission.READ_WALLPAPER_INTERNAL
Missing permissions required by WallpaperManager.peekDrawable: android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE or android.permission.READ_WALLPAPER_INTERNAL
Missing permissions required by WallpaperManager.getDrawable: android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE or android.permission.READ_WALLPAPER_INTERNAL
Missing permissions required by WallpaperManager.getFastDrawable: android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE or android.permission.READ_WALLPAPER_INTERNAL
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Overriding method should call `super.onEvaluateInputViewShown`
`onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
`onBackPressed` is no longer called for back gestures; migrate to AndroidX's backward compatible `OnBackPressedDispatcher`
Using internal inset dimension resource `status_bar_height` is not supported
Using internal inset dimension resource `status_bar_height` is not supported
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future
Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future
Suspicious indentation: This is conditionally executed; expected it to be indented
Must be one of: BluetoothAdapter.STATE_DISCONNECTED, BluetoothAdapter.STATE_CONNECTING, BluetoothAdapter.STATE_CONNECTED, BluetoothAdapter.STATE_DISCONNECTING
Must be one of: BluetoothAdapter.STATE_DISCONNECTED, BluetoothAdapter.STATE_CONNECTING, BluetoothAdapter.STATE_CONNECTED, BluetoothAdapter.STATE_DISCONNECTING
Must be one or more of: Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION, Intent.FLAG_GRANT_WRITE_URI_PERMISSION
Scheme matching is case sensitive and should only use lower-case characters
Permission is only granted to system apps
As of Android 11, this method no longer returns information about all apps; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
Your app is currently not handling Selected Photos Access introduced in Android 14+

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use `ResourcesCompat.getDrawable()`

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
